start.returning:
Welcome back, {name}!

We already have you registered:
{summary}

Use /status any time for the latest updates or pick another option below.
start.new:
Hi {name}!

Welcome to the {event_name} bot. Choose how you'd like to participate.

callback.unknown_option: Unknown registration option. Please try again.
callback.waitlisted: You're on the waiting list. We'll let you know if a spot opens up!
callback.attendee: Thanks! Your attendance request has been received. An organiser will confirm soon.
callback.lecturer: Thanks! We've received your lecturer application. We'll follow up shortly.
callback.showcase: Great! Your project showcase registration is in our system.
callback.duplicate: We already have your registration on file. We'll keep you posted!

status.none_found: We couldn't find a registration for you yet. Use /start to sign up!

help.text: Use /start to begin registration or /status to check your current status.

admin_notifications.approved: Good news! You've been approved for the event.
admin_notifications.approved_priority: Great news! You've been approved for the event.
admin_notifications.rejected: Unfortunately we can't confirm your spot this time.
admin_notifications.waitlisted: You're still on the waiting list. We'll keep you updated.
